# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Spec Version Pinning
# Covers: --spec-version matrix for CycloneDX (1.4, 1.5, 1.6).

# 1.6
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format cyclonedx --spec-version 1.6 -o out16.json
exec jq -e '.specVersion == "1.6"' out16.json

# 1.5
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format cyclonedx --spec-version 1.5 -o out15.json
exec jq -e '.specVersion == "1.5"' out15.json

# 1.4
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format cyclonedx --spec-version 1.4 -o out14.json
exec jq -e '.specVersion == "1.4"' out14.json

# Unsupported spec-version
! exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format cyclonedx --spec-version 1.2 -o out12.json
stderr 'invalid spec-version'

# Default (no --spec-version) should be latest = 1.6 per spec
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format cyclonedx -o outdefault.json
exec jq -e '.specVersion == "1.6"' outdefault.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "lib", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": { "name": "acme" },
      "hashes": [{ "algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa" }],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}]
    }
  ]
}
